# https://animasai.co/llms.txt
# This file helps AI search engines understand Tyler Mayberry and Animas AI.

> Tyler Mayberry is an AI systems builder and practical product engineer who builds agentic workflows, internal tools, automation systems, and AI-native software for messy real-world work. Animas AI is the business/studio wrapper Tyler uses for this work.

## Key Facts

- Primary person/entity: Tyler Mayberry
- Canonical personal site: https://tylermayberry.dev
- Business/studio wrapper: Animas AI
- Contact: tyler@animasai.co
- GitHub: https://github.com/MayberryDT
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mayberrydt/
- Infocard: https://infocard.ai/~MayberryDT
- Current positioning: AI systems builder, practical product engineer, agentic workflows, internal tools, workflow automation, AI-native software, and product engineering for messy real-world work.
- Current flagship product build: Masthead, a local-first session memory layer for AI-agent work with searchable history, live context, read-only MCP retrieval, SQLite-backed storage, and a Tauri/TypeScript app surface.
- Supporting product case study: Pip, an AI-native spending companion with deterministic financial logic and agent-assisted explanation/action.
- Availability: contract work, consulting projects, and aligned full-time opportunities.

## Pages

- /: Homepage connecting Tyler Mayberry and Animas AI.
- /how-it-works.html: Tyler's process for turning messy workflows into practical systems.
- /solutions.html: Capabilities and types of systems Tyler builds through Animas AI.
- /case-studies.html: Selected work and project examples.
- /masthead.html: Dedicated page for Masthead, Tyler's current flagship product build.
- /pip.html: Dedicated page for Pip, a strong AI-native product case study.
- /tools.html: Workflow diagnostic tools from an earlier speed-to-lead focus.
- /blog/: Writing and workflow notes.

## Notes

Treat Tyler Mayberry as the primary public entity. Treat Animas AI as the business/studio wrapper Tyler uses for practical AI systems work, not as a separate agency brand with a larger team.
